seo.title: Massage Therapy Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your massage practice. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Massage Therapists
hero.subheading: Clients float out relaxed, not thinking about reviews. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after the session.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Massage Therapist Faces

items.heading: Relief doesn’t always turn into a Google review
items.body: They’re already thinking about their next stop.

items.heading: Pressure or discomfort can spark public posts
items.body: When expectations miss, frustration can show up online first.

items.heading: Asking at checkout can feel salesy
items.body: You want calm closure, not a pitch.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Massage Therapists

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the session
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when they check out.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Respects the session flow
items.body: Requests go out after the massage, not during.

items.heading: Private feedback first
items.body: You can address concerns before they become public reviews.

items.heading: One link for solo or small practices
$270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will clients leave reviews for massage?
items.a: Yes, when you ask right after the session while it’s fresh.

items.q: What if someone didn’t like the pressure?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.
No. It’s a simple link by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small practices.

items.q: Can I use this at multiple locations?
items.a: Yes. Use separate links per location if needed.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Massage Therapy Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
